pages.raw_text:
The Washington Water Power
company is preparing to utilize some
of the power now going to waste at
the upper falls. The company owns
an old brick structure at the lower
end of Big Island. connected with
which is an intake already con-
structed.


The company is now preparing to
place new 1900 horse power gen.
orator in this old building, which, it
is expected, will be in readiness to
receive the generator by the time it
arrives, in about 80 days.


Men are no wengaged on the build
ing preparing it for the new ma
chinery. The company has also been
stringing heavy copper wire cables
from the new plant-to-be to the city
for some time.


General Manager Blocker stated
this afternoon that the company in
tended to have the new plant simply
